arts.ttl: Chaos in Hungary as Tottenham's Europa League clash with Ferencvaros is DELAYED due to poor visibility after flares from home fans
arts.sum: The game was halted as a result of flares set off by home supporters, with the delay lasting for around a minute.

arts.ttl: Tottenham worst-case Dominic Solanke scenario clear with 14-word message after huge announcement
arts.sum: On his debut for Spurs against Leicester, Solanke was very bright, though he was unable to find the back of the net from several attempts at goal with an unfortunate injury then striking. Former Spurs star Harry Kane will likely play most of the two games, but Solanke could still feature, and with that, the possibility of injury striking is a scenario that could play out.

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Ferencvaros as Mikey Moore and Will Lankshear start
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has named Mikey Moore and Will Lankshear in his Tottenham Hotspur side to take on Ferencvaros on Thursday night in the Europa League. Mikey Moore and Will Lankshear both coming into the starting line-up with fellow academy youngsters, defenders Alfie Dorrington and Dante Cassanova, and 18-year-old winger Damola Ajayi on the bench.

arts.ttl: How England lined up for Dominic Solanke's last appearance SEVEN YEARS ago as Tottenham striker returns to Three Lions squad... with seven of his new team-mates still in school back in 2017!
arts.sum: Solanke's only previous appearance for England at senior level came in November 2017, shortly after his move to Liverpool.

arts.sum: Italy international Guglielmo Vicario made an extraordinary reaction save for Tottenham Hotspur in the Europa...

arts.ttl: Tottenham defend flying back from Man Utd win after fan backlash to James Maddison video
arts.sum: Tottenham decided to charter a private jet to whisk their players back to north London following their win over Manchester United at Old Trafford - all to save a few hours

arts.ttl: ‘One of these weeks’: Chris Sutton says he has a sneaky feeling about £15m Tottenham player
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur haven’t had the best of starts to this season, but things are starting to click. Indeed, the north London club are still mid-table...

arts.ttl: Emerson Royal transfer from Tottenham upsets Milan fans as Kalulu shines for Juventus
arts.sum: Milan fans are even more upset to see Pierre Kalulu shine for Juventus as his...

arts.ttl: Ferencvaros vs Tottenham - Europa League: Live score, team news and updates as Will Lankshear and Mikey Moore are handed chance in Europe
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of the Europa League clash between Hungary side Ferencvaros and Tottenham as we provide you with all the build-up, team news and live action from the Groupama Arena.

arts.ttl: Time to invest in Spurs in Fantasy for their strong fixtures?
arts.sum: His role as the focal point of the Spurs attack has made a significant impact on his number of big chances - situations where the player is expected to score. Son's average of 6.6 points per match (ppm) is comfortably ahead of his midfield team-mates, though, with both Johnson and Maddison averaging 4.8ppm along with centre-back Micky van de Ven (£4.5m).
